text:
Once upon a time in a quiet little town lived a girl who loved cats. She would spend entire afternoons just watching them nap.

One day, after chasing a noisy birdhawk across the lawn, her favorite cat disappeared. She searched high and low under the couch, behind the wardrobe, anywhere she could think of. Weeks went by, and she hardly slept at night.

Then one foggy evening, sitting alone on her porch with tears threatening her eyes, she heard a soft paw pad. She looked up slowly. There stood her old gray tomCat.

“You’ve grown lonely,” he said.

She hugged him. That was all it took. The love between human and cat grew.

Years passed. She married an old sailor. They didn’t have a pet. But when her time came to travel she took her favorite book—stories she’d written. She read them softly as she sailed away.

That night, as stars twinkled above foggy waters, she thought of her beloved gray
